headline: Healthcare AI community shifts focus beyond current model limitations
body: The healthcare AI discussion is moving toward post-current-model planning, with multiple technical conversations surfacing around security, infrastructure, and agent development patterns. For healthcare organizations, this signals a critical moment: relying on today's AI capabilities for clinical workflows without contingency planning creates operational risk. Vendors claiming single-model solutions should face scrutiny about their transition strategies. Healthcare systems need to demand that AI partners clarify their roadmap beyond current architectures, especially for regulated use cases where model changes require workflow reassessment and compliance validation.
